title: Modern Lucky Block Addon
description: Original Lucky Block addon recreated for the Modern Lucky Block mod.
body:
The original Lucky Block addon recreated for the new [Modern Lucky Block mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-lucky-block/settings/description).

Experience nearly all of the classic drops, including, but not limited to:
- Wishing wells
- Cages
- Lucky temples
- Bob
- Monster apocalypses
- The beacon
- Riches
- Instant death
- Pets!
- The wither!
- And much more!
